reviews.comment:
Muy mala la atención  espera desmedida, dos playeros uno trabaja, no utilizan las don máquinas automaticamente  eso demora bastante pongan más personal

(Translated by Google)
The service is terrible, the wait is excessively long, there are two attendants, one of whom is actually working, and they don't use the machines automatically, which causes significant delays. They should hire more staff.
